BatchGetCollaborationAnalysisTemplate.description: Grants permission to view details of analysisTemplates associated to the collaboration

BatchGetSchema.description: Grants permission to view details for schemas

BatchGetSchemaAnalysisRule.description: Grants permission to view analysis rules associated with schemas

CreateAnalysisTemplate.description: Grants permission to create a new analysis template

CreateCollaboration.description: Grants permission to create a new collaboration, a shared data collaboration environment

CreateCollaborationChangeRequest.description: Grants permission to create a change request in a collaboration

CreateConfiguredAudienceModelAssociation.description: Grants permission to link a Cleanrooms ML configured audience model with a collaboration by creating a new association

CreateConfiguredTable.description: Grants permission to create a new configured table

CreateConfiguredTableAnalysisRule.description: Grants permission to create a analysis rule for a configured table

CreateConfiguredTableAssociation.description: Grants permission to link a configured table with a collaboration by creating a new association

CreateConfiguredTableAssociationAnalysis.description: Grants permission to create an analysis rule for a configured table association

CreateIdMappingTable.description: Grants permission to link an id mapping workflow with a collaboration by creating a new id mapping table

CreateIdNamespaceAssociation.description: Grants permission to link an AWS Entity Resolution Id Namespace with a collaboration by creating a new association

CreateMembership.description: Grants permission to join collaborations by creating a membership

CreatePrivacyBudgetTemplate.description: Grants permission to create a new privacy budget template

DeleteAnalysisTemplate.description: Grants permission to delete an existing analysis template

DeleteCollaboration.description: Grants permission to delete an existing collaboration

DeleteConfiguredAudienceModelAssociation.description: Grants permission to delete an existing configured audience model association

DeleteConfiguredTable.description: Grants permission to delete a configured table

DeleteConfiguredTableAnalysisRule.description: Grants permission to delete an existing analysis rule

DeleteConfiguredTableAssociation.description: Grants permission to remove a configured table association from a collaboration

DeleteConfiguredTableAssociationAnalysis.description: Grants permission to delete an existing configured table association analysis rule

DeleteIdMappingTable.description: Grants permission to remove an id mapping table from a collaboration

DeleteIdNamespaceAssociation.description: Grants permission to remove an Id Namespace Association from a collaboration

DeleteMember.description: Grants permission to delete members from a collaboration

DeleteMembership.description: Grants permission to leave collaborations by deleting a membership

DeletePrivacyBudgetTemplate.description: Grants permission to delete an existing privacy budget template

GetAnalysisTemplate.description: Grants permission to view details for an analysis template

GetCollaboration.description: Grants permission to view details for a collaboration

GetCollaborationAnalysisTemplate.description: Grants permission to view details for an analysis template within a collaboration

GetCollaborationChangeRequest.description: Grants permission to get a change request in a collaboration

GetCollaborationConfiguredAudienceModelA.description: Grants permission to view details for a configured audience model association within a collaboration

GetCollaborationIdNamespaceAssociation.description: Grants permission to get id namespace association within a collaboration

GetCollaborationPrivacyBudgetTemplate.description: Grants permission to view details for a privacy budget template within a collaboration

GetConfiguredAudienceModelAssociation.description: Grants permission to view details for a configured audience model association

GetConfiguredTable.description: Grants permission to view details for a configured table

GetConfiguredTableAnalysisRule.description: Grants permission to view analysis rules for a configured table

GetConfiguredTableAssociation.description: Grants permission to view details for a configured table association

GetConfiguredTableAssociationAnalysisRul.description: Grants permission to view analysis rules for a configured table association

GetIdMappingTable.description: Grants permission to view details of an id mapping table

GetIdNamespaceAssociation.description: Grants permission to view details of an id namespace association

GetMembership.description: Grants permission to view details about a membership

GetPrivacyBudgetTemplate.description: Grants permission to view details for a privacy budget template

GetProtectedJob.description: Grants permission to view a protected job

GetProtectedQuery.description: Grants permission to view a protected query

GetSchema.description: Grants permission to view details for a schema

GetSchemaAnalysisRule.description: Grants permission to view analysis rules associated with a schema

ListAnalysisTemplates.description: Grants permission to list available analysis templates

ListCollaborationAnalysisTemplates.description: Grants permission to list available analysis templates within a collaboration

ListCollaborationChangeRequests.description: Grants permission to list change requests in a collaboration

ListCollaborationConfiguredAudienceModel.description: Grants permission to list available configured audience model association within a collaboration

ListCollaborationIdNamespaceAssociations.description: Grants permission to list id namespace within a collaboration

ListCollaborationPrivacyBudgetTemplates.description: Grants permission to list available privacy budget templates within a collaboration

ListCollaborationPrivacyBudgets.description: Grants permission to list privacy budgets within a collaboration

ListCollaborations.description: Grants permission to list available collaborations

ListConfiguredAudienceModelAssociations.description: Grants permission to list available configured audience model associations for a membership

ListConfiguredTableAssociations.description: Grants permission to list available configured table associations for a membership

ListConfiguredTables.description: Grants permission to list available configured tables

ListIdMappingTables.description: Grants permission to list available id mapping tables for a membership

ListIdNamespaceAssociations.description: Grants permission to list entity resolution data associations for a membership

ListMembers.description: Grants permission to list the members of a collaboration

ListMemberships.description: Grants permission to list available memberships

ListPrivacyBudgetTemplates.description: Grants permission to list available privacy budget templates

ListPrivacyBudgets.description: Grants permission to list available privacy budgets

ListProtectedJobs.description: Grants permission to list protected jobs

ListProtectedQueries.description: Grants permission to list protected queries

ListSchemas.description: Grants permission to view available schemas for a collaboration

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

PassCollaboration.description: Grants permission to access a collaboration in the context of Clean Rooms ML custom models

PassMembership.description: Grants permission to access a membership in the context of Clean Rooms ML custom models

PopulateIdMappingTable.description: Grants permission to start an Id Mapping Job in AWS Entity Resolution to generate id mapping results in cleanrooms collaboration.

PreviewPrivacyImpact.description: Grants permission to preview privacy budget template settings

StartProtectedJob.description: Grants permission to start protected jobs

StartProtectedQuery.description: Grants permission to start protected queries

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag a resource

UpdateAnalysisTemplate.description: Grants permission to update details of the analysis template

UpdateCollaboration.description: Grants permission to update details of the collaboration

UpdateCollaborationChangeRequest.description: Grants permission to update a change request in a collaboration

UpdateConfiguredAudienceModelAssociation.description: Grants permission to update a configured audience model association

UpdateConfiguredTable.description: Grants permission to update an existing configured table

UpdateConfiguredTableAllowedColumns.description: Grants permission to update the allowed columns of an existing configured table

UpdateConfiguredTableAnalysisRule.description: Grants permission to update analysis rules for a configured table

UpdateConfiguredTableAssociation.description: Grants permission to update a configured table association

UpdateConfiguredTableAssociationAnalysis.description: Grants permission to update analysis rules for a configured table association

UpdateConfiguredTableReference.description: Grants permission to update the table reference of an existing configured table

UpdateIdMappingTable.description: Grants permission to update an id mapping table

UpdateIdNamespaceAssociation.description: Grants permission to update a entity resolution input association

UpdateMembership.description: Grants permission to update details of a membership

UpdatePrivacyBudgetTemplate.description: Grants permission to update details of the privacy budget template

UpdateProtectedJob.description: Grants permission to update protected jobs

UpdateProtectedQuery.description: Grants permission to update protected queries

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
